originalTitle: Severe flooding kills 66 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
title: Severe flooding kills 66 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
content: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.

originalTitle: Ugandan opposition leader goes abroad after two months in hiding
title: Ugandan opposition leader goes abroad after two months in hiding
content: Uganda's military chief has said Bobi Wine is wanted "dead or alive", although some ministers have denied he is being sought.

originalTitle: Will Trump help or hinder Zimbabwe's white farmers in their compensation battle?
title: Will Trump help or hinder Zimbabwe's white farmers in their compensation battle?
content: They have engaged a lobbying firm with close ties to the US president to argue their case.

originalTitle: Why is NYC’s Mamdani facing criticism over response to attacks on wife?
title: Why is NYC’s Mamdani facing criticism over response to attacks on wife?
content: Mayor's wife criticised for past work related to Palestine, while Mamdani's response rebuked by some supporters.

originalTitle: Manchester United beat Aston Villa 3-1  to tighten hold on third place
title: Manchester United beat Aston Villa 3-1  to tighten hold on third place
content: Bruno Fernandes reaches 100 assists in all competitions after setting up two goals in crucial 3-1 win over Villa.

originalTitle: Jamal Rayyan, the first face of Al Jazeera, dies at 73
title: Jamal Rayyan, the first face of Al Jazeera, dies at 73
content: The Palestinian presenter delivered the network's first-ever bulletin when it went on air in 1996.

originalTitle: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
title: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
content: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".

originalTitle: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
title: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
content: Volodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia.

originalTitle: Severe flooding kills 66 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
title: Severe flooding kills 66 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
content: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.

originalTitle: What next for Dowman - how do you look after a precious talent?
title: What next for Dowman - how do you look after a precious talent?
content: The question now is how can Arsenal continue to develop and take care of Max Dowman after his first Premier League goal.

title: Spain-Argentina Finalissima in Qatar cancelled
content: The Finalissima between Argentina and Spain set to be held in Qatar this month is cancelled because of the war in the Middle East.

originalTitle: Villa unable to overcome the 'huge challenge' of Man Utd - Emery
title: Villa unable to overcome the 'huge challenge' of Man Utd - Emery
content: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery admits his side were unable to "control" enough possession of the ball to contain Manchester United as Villa suffer a 3-1 defeat at Old Trafford.
